popularStory.headline: THE LEETE FAMILY HISTORY FOLLOWS:
popularStory.description:
APRIL 13, 2017:

WILLIAM LEETE was born about 1520 of Eversden, Cambridgeshire, England, to John Leete (1501-1552) and Helen/Ellen Burgoyne (1501-1564.)  He married Flora Brown about 1538 of Cambridge …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Joseph Leete of Eversden於1500年出生在英國坎布利其爾蕾托 艾福斯達時，他的父親Thomas Leete27歲，母親Maria Slade22歲。他於1518年與Helen Burgoyne在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾艾福斯達結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1551年12月25日在他的家鄉享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Joseph Leete of Eversden于1500年出生在英国坎布利其爾蕾托 艾福斯達时，他的父亲Thomas Leete27岁，母亲Maria Slade22岁。他于1518年与Helen Burgoyne在英国英格兰坎布利其爾艾福斯達结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1551年12月25日在他的家乡享年51岁，埋葬在英国英格兰坎布利其爾。

nameMeanings.name: Leete
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: An early American bearer of this name was one of the founders ofGuilford, CT. William Leete (c. 1613–83), a colonial governorof New Haven colony and CT, was born at Dodington, Huntingtonshire,England. He converted to Puritanism and sailed for America to escapepersecution in May 1639.

variants.name: Leet
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a watercourse orroad junction, Old English gelǣt, or a habitational namefrom Leat in Devon, or The Leete in Essex, named with this element.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Joseph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the biblical Hebrew name Yosef, meaning ‘(God) shall add (another son)’. This was borne by the favourite son of Jacob, whose brothers became jealous of him and sold him into slavery (Genesis 37). He was taken to Egypt, where he rose to become chief steward to Pharaoh, and was eventually reconciled to his brothers when they came to buy corn during a seven-year famine (Genesis 43–7). In the New Testament Joseph is the name of the husband of the Virgin Mary. It is also borne by a rich Jew, Joseph of Arimathea (Matthew 27:57; Mark 15:43; Luke 23:50; John 19:38), who took Jesus down from the Cross, wrapped him in a shroud, and buried him in a rock tomb. According to medieval legend, Joseph of Arimathea brought the Holy Grail to Britain. The name was uncommon in Britain in the Middle Ages but was revived in the mid 16th century and had become popular by the 1630s, remaining so ever since.

variants.name: Josef
meanings: , Dutch, Scandinavian, and Czech spelling of   Joseph  , now also in use in the English‐speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When John Joseph Leete of Eversden was born in 1500, in Little Eversden, Cambridgeshire, England, his father, Thomas Leete, was 27 and his mother, Maria Slade, was 22. He married Helen Burgoyne in 1518, in Eversden, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died on 25 December 1551, in his hometown, at the age of 51, and was buried in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Joseph Leete of Eversden est né en 1500, à Little Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Leete, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Maria Slade, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Helen Burgoyne en 1518, à Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé le 25 décembre 1551, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Joseph Leete of Eversden 1500 in Little Eversden, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Leete 27 und seine Mutter Maria Slade 22. Er hat 1518 in Eversden, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom Helen Burgoyne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb am 25. Dezember 1551 im Alter von 51 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Joseph Leete of Eversden è nato il nel 1500 nel Little Eversden, Cambridgeshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Leete, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Maria Slade, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Helen Burgoyne nel 1518, nel Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì il 25 dicembre 1551, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Joseph Leete of Eversdenが1500年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアリットル エバースデンで生まれた時，父Thomas Leeteは27歳，母Maria Sladeは22歳であった。1518年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアエバースデンでHelen Burgoyneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1551年12月25日に故郷で51歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Joseph Leete of Eversden(이)가 1500년 영국 캄브리지실르 리틀 에버즈든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Leete(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria Slade(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1518년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 에버즈든에서 Helen Burgoyne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1551년 12월 25일 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르에 묻혔다.

mn.Eversden, Cambridgeshire, England: Caer Grawnt, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Joseph Leete of Eversden nasceu em 1500, em Little Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Leete, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Maria Slade, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Helen Burgoyne em 1518, em Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 25 de dezembro de 1551, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Joseph Leete of Eversden родился в 1500 г. в местности литл эвирсден, камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Leete было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria Slade, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Helen Burgoyne в 1518 г. в местности эвирсден, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер 25 декабря 1551 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Joseph Leete of Eversden nació en 1500, en Little Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Leete, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Maria Slade, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Helen Burgoyne en 1518, en Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió el 25 de diciembre de 1551, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
